channel.title: Divinity Ii -- Dragon Knight Saga on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Divinity Ii -- Dragon Knight Saga on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Divinity II don't care what class you are
item.description: Just because my character is wearing plate armor and swinging a two-handed sword doesn’t mean she isn’t a mean spell caster, because she is. Magic users in Divinity II: The Dragon Knight Saga would kick a D&D magic user’s butt to the gates of hell and back. It’s okay to make an entirely unbalanced character in a single player RPG; you are, after all, expected to save the world at some point.
